channel.title: Permutation on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Permutation on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Matrix #4: Matrix Problems — Fibonacci Subarray Sums, Gaussian Elimination & Expected Value
item.description: Hard matrix problems: Fibonacci squared subarray sum with segment-tree 4-tuple and companion matrix; cycle-decomposition partition state space for random-swap sorting, first-step analysis, and Gaussian elimination.

item.title: Combinatorics #1.1: Permutations and Combinations
item.description: Hockey Stick identity, addition/multiplication principles, binomial identities, example problems: bitonic sequences, multiset permutations, multi-layer coloring DP, CCPC Subpermutation.
